name: Amplify 2.0

data_sources.note: Athene Amplify 2.0 prospectus filed 2024 (Athene Annuity and Life Company, CIK 837332). Buffer options 10/20/30 available. 6-year withdrawal-charge period. Regular Amplify 2.0 (this product) carries a 0.95% annual segment fee; the NF variant has no annual segment fee.

Athene Amplify 2.0 surrender schedule 8/8/7/6/5/4 over 6 years (NOT 7 years as in synthetic anchor 9/8/7/6/5/4/3 — synthetic spec was incorrect). Surrender schedule updated to prospectus-verified 8/8/7/6/5/4. Free withdrawal 10% of purchase payment Yr 1, 10% contract value Yr 2+. Current cap (1-yr S&P 500 PTP with 10% buffer) = 17% per carrier rate flier.

Athene Annuity and Life Company AM Best FSR A+ (Superior) — upgraded from prior 'A'. Synthetic spec had 'A'; updated to 'A+'. Athene is a subsidiary of Apollo Global Management (pe_owned=true confirmed).

verification_notes: Surrender schedule corrected (synthetic 9/8/7/6/5/4/3 -> prospectus 8/8/7/6/5/4); AM Best updated A -> A+; cap rate updated 0.09 -> 0.13 reflecting current rate sheet (still below NF variant's 0.17 because this variant carries 0.95% segment fee). Cap rate update is a modest move toward current public range; M&E remains 0 (segment fee is not modeled as a contract-level M&E).
